name: Siberian Mining Group Company Limited
summary: Siberian Mining Group Company Limited, an investment holding company, trades in gasoline in the Republic of Korea. It operates through Mining; and Mineral Resources, Commodities and Other Trading segments. The company is also involved in the trading of commodities and mineral resources. In addition, it holds coal mining and exploration rights in Russia. The company was incorporated in 2002 and is headquartered in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
